import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  if string.is_empty(trimmed)
    println("")
    Ok(())
  else
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    mut prev_opt: Option<Int> = None

    while i < parts.len()
      let word_opt = parts.get(i)
      match word_opt
      when Some(word)
        let n_opt = string.parse_int(word)
        match n_opt
        when Some(n)
          let should_add = match prev_opt
          when Some(p)
            n != p
          when None
            true
          end
          if should_add
            result = list.push(result, n)
            prev_opt = Some(n)
          end
        when None
          Ok(())
        end
      when None
        Ok(())
      end
      i = i + 1
    end

    mut out = ""
    mut j = 0
    while j < result.len()
      let v_opt = result.get(j)
      match v_opt
      when Some(v)
        if j == 0
          out = "#{v}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        Ok(())
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    println(out)
    Ok(())
  end
end
